data.description: ticket-next-batch.sh is a ~900-line bash orchestrator (graph + file-impact) and the least latency-sensitive read. Timebox a spike to port it to a package fn; if cost/risk is high, LEAVE on subprocess and record the decision here. Do not let it block Steps 0/2/3 or straddle indefinitely. AC: explicit ported-or-deferred decision recorded.
data.title: #2 Step 4: next_batch — in-process spike or defer (timeboxed)
